overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along the Del Perro beachfront promenade during golden hour. The character moves past colorful commercial buildings, large billboards, and beachfront properties with the amusement park pier visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: colorful beachfront commercial strip with arcade buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past colorful storefronts with red awnings and For Lease signs

entered.detail: multi-story building with red awnings and colorful murals at street level
white building with large red For Lease signage on upper floors
tall palm trees lining the left side of the promenade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a paved beachfront promenade past colorful commercial buildings with red awnings. Palm trees line the left side while pedestrians walk in the same direction, and the late afternoon sun casts long shadows across the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial promenade with large advertisement billboard

events.description: exiting the colorful arcade strip into wider commercial area with large billboard visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade past mixed commercial buildings and large planters

entered.detail: tall building with large blue advertisement reading SUN'S UP on the facade
beige building with blue canvas awnings over ground floor windows
large cylindrical concrete planters with greenery

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider promenade as the colorful arcade buildings fall behind. A massive blue billboard dominates the center view while buildings with blue awnings line the right side. The palm trees are now closer on the left as the character continues walking forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier approach area with street ramp and utility poles

events.description: approaching street ramp intersection with dark wooden pier buildings on the left

agents.ego_description: walking toward the pier area with a slight turn to the right past the street ramp

notable_agents.action: man in green jacket and khaki pants walking in the same direction

entered.detail: concrete vehicle ramp leading up to the street level on the right side
dark wooden building with white railings and blue awnings marking the pier entrance
wooden utility poles with power lines crossing the street

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a street intersection with a concrete ramp leading upward on the right. Dark wooden pier buildings with distinctive architecture appear on the left while utility poles and wires become visible. The large billboard and commercial buildings from the previous section are now behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade with sandy beach and amusement park

events.description: sun setting creates golden hour backlighting as beach and amusement park come into full view

agents.ego_description: walking along the beachfront promenade with sand visible to the left and amusement park ahead

entered.detail: expanse of sand leading down to the water with beach vegetation
large ferris wheel and roller coaster structures of the Del Perro pier amusement park
green canopy structures and benches on the sand

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the beachfront proper with sand visible on the left and the amusement park pier in the distance. The setting sun creates a warm backlight effect. The character continues along the promenade past other pedestrians with the roller coaster and ferris wheel now prominent in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a beachfront promenade that transitions from a colorful commercial strip into a wide vista of a coastal amusement park. It begins with the character walking past vibrant buildings with red awnings and palm trees under the long shadows of the late afternoon sun. As the arcade buildings fall behind, the scene opens into a wider walkway dominated by a massive blue billboard and structures with blue awnings. The camera then shifts toward a street intersection featuring a concrete ramp and dark wooden pier architecture before the environment opens up to the beachfront proper. Finally, the view expands to reveal the sandy shore and the distant amusement park pier, where the setting sun creates a warm backlight against the silhouette of a roller coaster and ferris wheel.
